hero.headline: Authentic Vietnamese Wellness Massage
hero.subheadline: Restore your body, refresh your mind, and experience authentic Vietnamese wellness therapies.

why.title: Why choose Massage Khoe Viet
why.copy: A calm sanctuary where Vietnamese therapeutic traditions meet premium hospitality, herbal care, and restorative rituals designed for city life.

traditional.title: Traditional Vietnamese Therapy
traditional.copy: Rooted techniques focused on pressure relief, circulation, and deep relaxation.

herbal.title: Herbal Wellness
herbal.copy: Natural herbs, compresses, and baths to support detox, warmth, and comfort.

japanese.title: Japanese-style Relaxation
japanese.copy: Refined spatial design and soothing rituals inspired by luxury Japanese spas.

professional.title: Professional Service
professional.copy: Thoughtful therapists, polished service, and a premium guest journey from arrival to rest.

servicesPreview.title: Wellness packages crafted for recovery
servicesPreview.copy: Choose a restorative session with sauna, herbal hydrotherapy, bodywork, and healthy refreshments.

gallery.title: Spa experience gallery
gallery.copy: From herbal baths to quiet lounges, every corner is designed to lower stress and restore balance.

store.title: Storefront & interior
store.copy: Explore the reception, treatment areas, and calm corners designed to make every visit feel warm, welcoming, and restorative.

testimonials.title: Loved by locals and travelers
testimonials.copy: Guests come for muscle relief, sleep recovery, and the peaceful atmosphere that makes every visit feel like an escape.

items.name: Minh Anh
items.review: Excellent service, beautiful atmosphere, and the herbal treatment felt incredibly authentic.

items.name: Sophie T.
items.review: A luxurious Vietnamese spa experience with warm staff and exceptional massage quality.

items.name: David L.
items.review: Perfect after a long work trip. The sauna and body massage package was worth every minute.

about.title: Wellness inspired by Vietnamese healing traditions
about.lead: Massage Khỏe Việt was created to bring together traditional massage, natural herbs, and quiet premium hospitality in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City.
about.body1: Our philosophy centers on holistic healing: warming the body, calming the nervous system, and helping each guest recover from stress, travel fatigue, and everyday tension.
about.body2: Every treatment combines authentic Vietnamese wellness values with the refinement of a Japanese luxury spa retreat.
about.start: Founded with a mission to elevate traditional Vietnamese massage in a modern premium setting.
about.herbs: Expanded herbal rituals and hydrotherapy treatments using nature-inspired wellness practices.
about.expansion: Opened a second branch to welcome more local guests, office workers, and international travelers.
about.today: Continuing to deliver restorative, elegant, and accessible wellness experiences every day.

servicesPage.title: Signature service menu
servicesPage.copy: Thoughtfully layered spa rituals for relaxation, recovery, and full-body renewal.
